title: FMA withdraws license of HESSE DIGITAL AG

FMA withdraws license of HESSE DIGITAL AG
FMA withdraws license of HESSE DIGITAL AG
08.07.25
•
Licence
The Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority (FMA) has withdrawn the insurance license of HESSE DIGITAL AG, 9491 Ruggell, and appointed a special representative who is responsible for the proper processing and transfer of insurance contracts and the protection of policyholder interests.
This content has been translated using a fully automated machine translation tool. Some content may not be accurately translated.
